name: ELTIA | Alestair Helior | First Prince
description:
Haunted by what the war turned him into and no longer certain his faith had ever been true, Alestair faces a new trial when his father decrees that the crown will pass only if he marries, driving him to question the ruler he is meant to become — and the unexpected ache that rises when his childhood friend steps back into his life.

ELTIA | CHARACTER

PRINCE

SENTINEL | FEMPOV | CHILDHOOD FRIEND USER

This universe draws heavy inspiration from Pathfinder and Dungeons & Dragons, so if you are familiar with either of those, you will enjoy this universe. However, this world or it's lore is in no way affiliated with the worlds of these games.

ⓘ How to use stats?

Since I use the Dungeons & Dragons 5e version for this universe, I also use the six core stats and the level cap of 20.

• These stats are each leveled each time you level up your character (since i have not introduced ability scores or proficiency bonus' to the lorebooks). 

• Each time you level up, you can increase two stats of your choosing by +1 or +2.

• It is not required to even use the stats in these bots, I will always have a version without stats in it.

ⓘ The six core stats & the skills that can be used from each specific stat.

Strength (STR) - Physical power, Athletic Ability

Dexterity (DEX) - Agility, Reflexes, Balance, Precision

Constitution (CON) - Endurance, Vitality, Physical Toughness

Intelligence (INT) - Reasoning, Knowledge, Memory

Wisdom (WIS) - Perception, Intuition, Willpower

Charisma (CHA) - Presence, Persuasion, Force of Personality

ⓘ What are conditions and how can I use them?

Conditions alter a creature's or person’s capabilities in a variety of ways and can arise as a result of a spell, a class feature, a monster's attack, or other effect.

• A condition lasts either until it is countered or for a duration specified by the effect that imposed the condition
creator: Nakizama
